prompt: A stylized cinematic illustration inspired by a neon-soaked Florida crime-game cover scene at sunset, showing two armed protagonists standing heroically on a wooden marina dock in the foreground, facing the viewer. The scene has a polished modern video game key-art look with pastel vaporwave colors, warm pink and peach highlights, turquoise water, and a clear blue sky. On the right, a tall athletic young man in a white t-shirt, open short-sleeve blue tropical print shirt, tan cargo pants, and a wristwatch stands in a dominant forward pose with both hands aiming a silver semi-automatic pistol toward the camera. On the left, a curvy young woman with long dark curly hair tied half-up wears a black crop top, denim shorts, layered gold necklaces, and a crossbody bag at her hip, holding a handgun pointed downward in a relaxed but ready pose. Both characters are centered and framed like iconic action-game cover art. Behind them is a bright waterfront city skyline with high-rise hotels and apartment towers, a low bridge crossing the water, several palm trees on the left, and glossy reflections across the bay. Include 1 helicopter in the upper left sky, 1 police speedboat racing across the water on the right with a white wake, 1 sleek black speedboat docked in the lower right foreground with visible bullet cracks in the windshield, and 1 white seabird standing in the shallow water near the left side. Strong late-afternoon sunlight, long shadows, saturated retro Miami palette, crisp cel-shaded digital painting style, dramatic action-poster composition, ultra-clean lines, highly detailed environment, wide 16:9 framing.
